name: agentic-runner
description: Agentic Runner は coding-agents、Agentic StructCiv、CodexVideo などの subordinate execution workflow を自在に制御する上位 control-plane。対象 jobsite の .agentic-runner 状態に route_class、controlled_workflows、execution_owner、handoff、resume checkpoint、cross-workflow audit、固定ロール scaffold、supervised scoped assignment、source-change/debug/self-host gate を記録する。

interface.shortDescription: Upper control-plane for routing coding-agents, Agentic StructCiv, CodexVideo, handoff/audit, source CLI, and gates.
interface.longDescription: Resolves the jobsite or explicit --target-cwd repository, stores .agentic-runner state under that target git root, and acts as the upper control-plane above subordinate execution workflows such as coding-agents, Agentic StructCiv, and CodexVideo. Agentic Runner records route_class, controlled_workflows, execution_owner, handoff artifacts, resume checkpoints, and cross-workflow audit state instead of duplicating specialist execution. It also records a fixed role scaffold plus optional supervised scoped assignment packets, finite delegation depth, heartbeat-based supervision, stale-safe cancellation rules, intake, planning, audit, source-change metacognitive gating, debug root-cause integrity, metacognitive context-impact checks, and an explicit self-host gate so Agentic Runner source edits remain external-supervised by default.
defaultPrompt: Use Agentic Runner as the upper control-plane to classify, route, and write .agentic-runner state.
Create supervised packets for subordinate owners: coding-agents, Agentic StructCiv, or CodexVideo.
Audit Agentic Runner handoff, resume checkpoint, cross-workflow completion, and self-host conditions before source edits.
